2604.27607.title: JaiTTS: A Thai Voice Cloning Model
2604.27607.paper_summary: We present JaiTTS-v1.0, a state-of-the-art Thai voice cloning text-to-speech model built through continual training on a large Thai-centric speech corpus. The model architecture is adapted from VoxCPM, a tokenizer-free autoregressive TTS model. JaiTTS-v1.0 directly processes numerals and Thai-English code-switching, which is very common in realistic settings, without explicit text normalization. We test the models on short-duration speech generation and long-duration speech generation, which reflects many real-world use cases. JaiTTS-v1.0 achieves a state-of-the-art CER of 1.94\%, surpassing the human ground truth of 1.98% for short-duration tasks while performing on par with human ground truth for long-duration tasks. In human judgment evaluations, our model wins 283 of 400 pairwise comparisons against commercial flagships, with only 58 losses.
2604.27607.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 JaiTTS-v1.0，這是一個最先進的泰語語音克隆文本轉語音模型，通過在大型泰語語音語料庫上持續訓練而建成。模型架構改編自 VoxCPM，這是一個無標記的自回歸 TTS 模型。JaiTTS-v1.0 直接處理數字和泰英代碼切換，這在現實環境中非常普遍，無需明確的文本標準化。我們在短時長語音生成和長時長語音生成上測試了這些模型，這反映了許多現實世界的使用案例。JaiTTS-v1.0 在短時長任務中達到了 1.94\% 的最先進 CER，超過了人類基準的 1.98\%，而在長時長任務中表現與人類基準相當。在人類評價中，我們的模型在 400 次成對比較中贏得了 283 次，僅有 58 次失利。
2604.27607.author: Jullajak Karnjanaekarin et.al.
2604.27607.authors: Jullajak Karnjanaekarin, Pontakorn Trakuekul, Narongkorn Panitsrisit, Sumana Sumanakul, Vichayuth Nitayasomboon, Nithid Guntasin, Thanavin Denkavin, Attapol T. Rutherford
